title: Filtering a Widget
excerpt: Hello!  I’m working on developing a widget based app and I just noticed that the filtering funnel was added to my custom widget without me doing anything.  The filters don’t seem to automatically be working though.  Is t…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I’m working on developing a widget based app and I just noticed that the filtering funnel was added to my custom widget without me doing anything. The filters don’t seem to automatically be working though. Is there any new documentation available on how to get filters working on my custom widget? Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @liambailey,

Would you be able to please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com with this information so we can take care of it over there?

Looking forward to hearing from you via email!

Cheers,
Matias
